text: And he holds it all, both small and great, rich and poor, three and one to a single lot in our right hand,
one that holds it, and I know now that five or six are saved in the apple of the name of the beast, and the name of his name.
He is a beast, let him that understand the account of the name of the beast, for it is the name of a man,
and his name is the son of the beast.
